name: ringsage
documentation: # RingSAGE: Cycle-Aware Molecular Regression with Virtual Nodes

functions.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.cycle_detection.is_minimal_cycle
documentation:
Determines whether a given cycle in the graph is minimal by checking for internal connections.

Args:
    G (networkx.Graph): The input graph.
    cycle (list): A list of nodes representing a cycle.

Returns:
    bool: True if the cycle is minimal, False otherwise.

functions.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.cycle_detection.get_minimal_cycles
documentation:
Extracts minimal cycles from a graph.

Args:
    G (networkx.Graph): The input graph.

Returns:
    list: A list of minimal cycles, where each cycle is represented as a list of nodes.

functions.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.cycle_detection.get_cycle_info
documentation:
Converts a PyTorch-Geometric (PyG) graph to a NetworkX graph and extracts minimal cycles.

Args:
    pyg_graph (torch_geometric.data.Data): The input PyG graph.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary where keys are cycle indices and values are lists of nodes in each cycle.

functions.name: ringsage.utils.cycle_collate_fn
documentation:
Collates a list of graph data objects into a single batch, adding cycle information.

Args:
    batch (list): A list of PyTorch Geometric Data objects representing individual graphs.

Returns:
    torch_geometric.data.Batch: A batch object containing the collated graph data and cycle information.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.__init__
documentation:
RingSage implementation for graph neural networks.

Args:

: in_channels (int): Size of each input sample.
  out_channels (int): Size of each output sample.
  vn_dim (int): Dimension of virtual node features.
  edge_dim (int): Dimension of edge features.
  normalize (bool, optional): If set to {obj}`True`, output features will be `L_2`-normalized. (default: True)
  bias (bool, optional): If set to False, the layer will not learn an additive bias. (default: True)
  kwargs (optional): Additional arguments of `torch_geometric.nn.conv.MessagePassing`.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.forward
documentation:
Forward pass of the RingSage layer.

Args:

: x (Tensor): Input node features of shape {obj}`[num_nodes, in_channels]`.
  edge_index (Tensor): Graph connectivity in COO format with shape {obj}`[2, num_edges]`.
  edge_attr (Tensor): Edge features of shape {obj}`[num_edges, edge_dim]`.
  cycle_info (dict): Dictionary containing cycle information.
  size (tuple, optional): Graph size. (default: {obj}`None`)
  vn (Tensor, optional): Virtual node features of shape {obj}`[num_cycles, vn_dim]`.

Returns:

: Tuple\[Tensor, Tensor\]: Updated node and virtual node features.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.construct_vn_edge_index
documentation:
Construct custom edge index for propagating node features to virtual nodes.

Args:
    cycle_info (dict): Dictionary containing cycle information.
    num_nodes (int): Number of nodes in the graph.

Returns:
    Tensor: Custom edge index for virtual node propagation.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.distribute_vn_to_nodes
documentation:
Distributes virtual node embeddings to their corresponding nodes.

Args:
    vn_emb (torch.Tensor): Embeddings of virtual nodes.
    cycle_info (dict): Dictionary containing cycle information.
    num_nodes (int): Total number of nodes in the graph.

Returns:
    torch.Tensor: Node embeddings updated with virtual node information.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.message
documentation:
Message function for the RingSage layer.

Args:

: x_j (Tensor): Neighbor node features of shape {obj}`[num_edges, in_channels]`.
  edge_attr (Tensor, optional): Edge features of shape {obj}`[num_edges, edge_dim]`.

Returns:

: Tensor: Concatenated node and edge features of shape {obj}`[num_edges, in_channels + edge_dim]`.

methods.name: ringsage.ringsageconv.layer.RingSage.aggregate
documentation:
Aggregate function for the RingSage layer.

Args:

: inputs (Tensor): Input features of shape {obj}`[num_nodes, in_channels]`.
  index (LongTensor): Node indices holding the same {obj}`num_edges` edges in the same order as `inputs`.

Returns:

: Tensor: Aggregated node features of shape {obj}`[num_nodes, in_channels]`.

functions.name: ringsage.evaluate.evaluate
documentation:
Evaluate the performance of a GNN model on a given dataset.

Args:
    model (nn.Module): The GNN model to evaluate.
    loader (Any): The data loader for the dataset.
    eval_metric (Task, optional): The type of evaluation metric to use. Defaults to Task.GRAPH_REGRESSION.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing the average loss and the evaluation metric value.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.__init__
documentation:
GNN model for molecular property prediction.

Args:
    cfg (ModelConfig): Configuration for the GNN model.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.forward
documentation:
Forward pass of the GNN model.

Args:
    x (Tensor): Input node features of shape num_nodes, in_channels.
    edge_index (Tensor): Graph connectivity in COO format with shape 2, num_edges.
    batch (Tensor): Batch vector assigning each node to a specific graph in the batch.
    edge_attr (Tensor, optional): Edge features of shape num_edges, edge_dim.
    cycle_info (dict, optional): Dictionary containing cycle information.

Returns:
    Tensor: Output tensor of shape [num_nodes, num_classes].

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.build_conv_layer
documentation:
Builds the appropriate convolutional layer based on the specified GNN module.

Args:
    gnn_module (GNN): The type of GNN module to use.

Returns:
    type: The convolutional layer class corresponding to the specified GNN module.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.loss
documentation:
Calculate the loss between the predicted and target values.

Args:
    pred (Tensor): Predicted values.
    target (Tensor): Target values.
    fn (Callable, optional): Custom loss function.

Returns:
    Tensor: Calculated loss.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.configure_optimizers
documentation:
Configure the optimizer for training.

Returns:
    torch.optim.Optimizer: Configured optimizer.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.configure_schedulers
documentation:
Configure the learning rate scheduler.

Args:
    optimizer (torch.optim.Optimizer): The optimizer to be used.

Returns:
    torch.optim.lr_scheduler._LRScheduler: Configured learning rate scheduler.

methods.name: ringsage.model.MoleculeRegressor.init_weights
documentation: Initialize the weights of the Linear Layers.

classes.name: ringsage.schemas.ModelConfig
documentation: Configuration for GNN model.

classes.name: ringsage.schemas.TrainingReport
documentation: Training report for GNN model.

classes.name: ringsage.schemas.EvaluationReport
documentation: Evaluation report for GNN model.

classes.name: ringsage.types.Task
documentation: Task type for GNN.

classes.name: ringsage.types.GNN
documentation: Message Passing types for GNN.

classes.name: ringsage.types.Scheduler
documentation: Learning rate scheduler type.

classes.name: ringsage.types.Optimizer
documentation: Optimizer type for updating GNN parameters.

functions.name: ringsage.train.train
documentation:
Standard training loop to training model over ZINC dataset.

Parameters
----------
model : nn.Module
    Model to train.
trainloader : DataLoader
    DataLoader for training dataset.
valloader : DataLoader
    DataLoader for validation dataset.
optimizer : torch.optim.Optimizer
    Optimizer to use for training.
epochs : int
    Number of epochs to train for.
device : str, optional
    Device to train on, by default "cpu".
val_metric : str, optional
    Metric to use for validation, by default "classification".
